title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 362.1116 - Rulemaking authority
text:
362.1116.  Rulemaking authority. — The director may issue forms and orders and, after notice and comment, may adopt and amend rules necessary or appropriate to carry out the provisions of sections 362.1010 to 362.1117 and may repeal rules and forms.
(L. 2017 H.B. 292, A.L. 2024 S.B. 1359)
